name: Chicken Stuff-a-Roni with Cheese Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Finely chopped cooked chicken or turkey
1/4 cup Dry white wine or gravy
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the filling ingredients; season with salt and pepper.
2. In a saucepan, melt butter over medium heat. Add flour and stir until smooth.
3. Gradually add chicken broth (or gravy) and milk, stirring constantly until thickened.
4. Stir in the remaining cheese sauce ingredients: grated cheddar cheese, Tobasco Sauce, salt, and pepper.
5. Fill Stuff-a-Roni with the prepared filling mixture.
6. Place a single layer of filled Stuff-a-Roni in a 2-quart baking dish.
7. Cover with the prepared cheese sauce.
8. Cover the dish with foil and bake at 375°F (190°C) for one hour, or cover with waxed paper and microwave for 30 minutes, turning once.
Note: This dish is often made after Thanksgiving when leftover turkey and gravy are available. The wine can be replaced with turkey gravy, and broth can also be substituted with the same.
